reviews.review_description: Unique game as a horror mental trip. Ok..it has some imperfections....but the concept itself is something totally different from any other game....that's worth trying if you are looking for something scary.  For me it deserves 4 stars..... Of course an update would fix lot of things

I finally got a chance to play Really Bad Dreams a few days ago. It’s very creepy and atmospheric and really interesting. I love the scary arms coming out of the walls! The puzzles are cool and the music / sound effects really bring you into the environment. I feel like it’s as if you’re coming down from a really bad chemical trip! (So I hear!) Bottom line is it’s fun and highly entertaining. Cannot wait to continue the journey into madness! Highly recommended!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this amazing feedback!

We’re really happy to hear that you enjoyed the atmosphere, the puzzles, and the overall immersion. A lot of care went into the sound design and visual moments, so it means a lot to see them mentioned.

We hope you’ll enjoy continuing the experience — thank you for the recommendation and for your support!

The development team

reviews.review_description: Wish it was longer but overall great game and worth the money

reviews.review_title: Great concept, few bugs to work out :D
reviews.review_description: I was lucky enough to win this experience and play it for the first time today and it's got so much potential, the atmosphere is great, the lighting is dynamic and immersive, the simple interaction with re-loading the flare gun whilst being chased was a great set piece, but it keeps crashing out back to OS sadlly at differing points, and I encountered a few glitches (dont pull the string whilst holding the bow unless you have arrow or it descends slowly into the floor and you need to let go to reset it) and during the first cinematic I loaded up backwards, so when I turned my lower body was facing the other way and was rooted facing the cinematic but I could turn freely above which caused lots of model twisting and clipping (if thats intentional no problem) - I want to play more, explore this experience but with 2 crashes (at random points) - 1 crash before I even started moving, the other after the apartment scene, just out of nowhere, leaves me worried I'll lose all immersion waiting for another crash out :( I'm on the latest OS of Meta, fully up to date so I'm not sure whats going wrong. I did record the whole thing, so if the dev wants the footage, let me know :D thanks again for letting me be lucky enough to get this game!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for taking the time to share such detailed feedback.

We’re really happy to hear that you enjoyed the atmosphere, lighting, and interactive moments — especially the sequence you mentioned, which was designed to be a strong tension point.

We understand how unexpected technical issues can affect immersion, and feedback like yours is extremely valuable in helping us improve the overall experience. Please rest assured that the project is actively supported and that stability and interaction refinements are an ongoing focus.

We truly appreciate your offer to share recorded footage — thank you for your support and for giving the experience a chance.

The development team

reviews.review_description: I love the sound effects, music, and background sounds that add to the immersion into this scary story.  There are many actions to perform and puzzles to solve to advance further into this dark and creepy environment.  I really love this game!

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your kind feedback!

We’re really happy to hear that you enjoyed the sound design, music, and overall immersion. Creating an engaging atmosphere and meaningful interactions was a key focus for us.

Thanks a lot for playing and for your support!

The development team

reviews.review_description: It's jobbies.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thank you for taking the time to leave a review ;)

We’re always open to constructive feedback, so if you encountered any specific issue or element that affected your experience, feel free to share more details — we’d be happy to look into it.

Best regards,
The development team

reviews.review_description: This game is exactly as it’s named. Very bad dreams lol. I’ve owned it for a long time and it’s a blast to play through. Keep up the great work and drop me another game because yall do it right 🤜🤛

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your amazing feedback!
We’re happy to know you enjoyed the experience and stayed with the game over time.

Your support truly means a lot to us.
The development team

reviews.review_description:
I wanted to love it, still trying to. Little buggy with getting stuck & using items. Doors/cabinets funky; usually empty.
Just lacking. Had promise. Kinda doubt the makers are doing anything for it though. Hate to, but I recommend you pass.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts.

We’re sorry to hear that the experience didn’t fully meet your expectations, especially given the potential you felt in the concept. Your feedback regarding interactions and progression is valuable and helps us reflect on areas that can be improved.

We’d like to reassure players that the project is still cared for, and comments like yours are important in guiding future improvements.

Thank you again for your honesty and for giving the game a chance.

reviews.review_description:
PLS FIX CHAPTER 3.1 I HAVE THE BABY IN MY HAND WALKING AND THE SCREEN GOES BLUE IT SAYS ERROR YGTPWN666 
I can’t get passed it I’ve restarted headset uninstalled and reinstalled please fix chapter 3.1

developer_response.body: Hi Noel, Don't be so afraid ! It's not really a bug, let the game continue and answer to the question, you will be surprised !

reviews.review_description: The game has some neat ideas that I really enjoyed but there were also a few moments where I got frustrated, confused and ended up resorting to looking at YouTube for a walk through because it's not always clear what you're supposed to be doing.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your feedback.

We’re glad you enjoyed the concept and some of the ideas in the game. The experience was designed to feel deliberately unsettling and to leave room for exploration, which can sometimes make progression less explicit.

Your comments are valuable and help us reflect on how to better balance atmosphere and clarity. Thank you for taking the time to share your experience.

reviews.review_description:
PLEASE PLEASE COME OUT WITH EPISODE 2, 3 AND 4  ALREADY!!!!  
If you love Horror, creepy and very TRIPPY games.. this is the one! 
I WANT MORE!! 
The rooms change on you and make you think you're losing it.. the voices in ur head are even more creepy.  
Also hopefully there will be more zombie fighting in the next one.  This game is super creepy.  And I'd like to see more 
k¡||¡ng and Gore in the next episode.  Even the ending credits was the trippiest ending ever. Loved the MAZE. 
This game has the best storyline as well.  So much potential for more episodes. 
Add more puzzles and fighting..and definitely more levels. And I'd be hooked for sure. 
Just wish it was longer.. as you can tell. Lol 
Creative VR3D.. i Hope u guys read this review.. awesome Job! 👌  release more and i will buy them ALL. 

Only issue I had was after i played a level and wanted to go back to twisted minds.. it slipped me past the coolest part where you see the eye under your feet and climb over it.  That whole section is gone when you go back to that level. It starts you in the bathroom where the stall is open to the little dirt hallway.  
I went back to the level right before thinking it would let me play starting at the joke " lose game save" blue screen,  but it skipped me past it again.   That was my favorite part so I'd like to play EACH scene again. Not just at middle save points.   Thanks

Edit:  2/14/25 
I figured out the twisted Minds level. It let me go back and play after i beat the game. 
I read some other reviews and wanted to add some input.  
I saw others had issues with loading the gun.  I think maybe they are having the problem i had at first.  The gun wasn't opening up right is all. The barrel was too far forward. But the next time i played it, it was opening and closing right.  So it made reloading faster and easier.  So maybe try backing out and going back into that level.  To reset the glitch. 

Also. Yes. Sometimes when you drop stuff. It's gone for good because it goes thru the floor. Or if u try to throw something ahead of you to use there..(like i wanted to throw some molotov cocktails up on the next ledge in twisted minds because u can't hold too much)  but it flies thru the wall and just keeps going.  Lol.  So definitely don't throw too hard.  😄 🤣   
Also. Trying to grab a weapon off your back without grabbing the whole bookbag is kinda hard.  I just gave up and removed the bookbag to grab the weapons. 
I also couldn't find the 3rd statue/prize.  I thought Maybe it was in the Alice N Wonderland level because i seen the thumbtacks kept going up the bookshelf.  But didn't see anything up there.  So oh well. No biggie. 
But even so, 
I just love this game so much that the little glitches here n there didn't bother me too bad.
My son wanted to play, and he made it to the Alice in wonderland room & the Fire 🔥  guy.. and he got too scared after that LOL.  So good job!!! 👍 i love this game so much that I can't wait for more episodes to come to Quest 2.   I even recorded my game and shared it to my FB and it got lots of views!   
Can't wait to play some more!!! Worth the money for sure! Thanks!

developer_response.body:
Hi urdarkestfears ! Millions thanks for this nice review, it goes straight the heart !
This comment give us the strenght to continue to port the current and future PSVR2 DLC !!! Thanks thanks thanks again !
Note : The save in each level is atomic and only resets once the level is completed, but we are considering a way to give players the choice to return to any stage they wish in each level.
Wish you the best,
Marc

reviews.review_description:
The game overall has been great and looks decent (though the environments have been very repetitive for a game that could've went crazy with the look/ feel of said environments) and the sounds minimalistic and just as repetitive (the constant whispering in many instances isn't scary so much as a bit annoying after a few minutes straight of it)
Also it's incredibly unclear what grabbing your head is very useful for, as going by the info panels when on a loading screen it should possibly reveal details and hidden spots in certain areas? Yet there's no sign at all of when or where to bother even trying to do that (unless it's just another mechanic the devs forgot to explain to you in the game itself, much like the reason you should "be careful not to over do it"..).

And though I've been enjoying the game recently enough, no matter if it seems like I was just being overly hard on it (the previous points are very small issues that don't bother me much, just thought I'd bring them up.), I do have a major issue, especially at this very moment...

The game has a huge issue, even WITHOUT dying, of removing items from your backpack that you've collected and saved. Especially health and misc items like batteries or cigarettes. As for weapons? You are lucky to have any but MAYBE 1 weapon at a time if you take a break and reload your game or go through any loading screens.
If you die, you lose EVERYTHING, yet are still sent back to try again. Because, if you have NOTHING THIS time, you are likly to do better than when you actually had weapons. Right? 
Right?.......🙄
Stupid design decision.. 

As for my big issue right now, every time I load my save, my flashlight's light is shining from my hand and the flashlight itself is gone from my backpack...
Luckily I at least had my axe since there is a zombie in this save room. But the last time I tried, my axe slipped from my grip from me releasing the grip button, but then completly disappeared! Leaving me with NO weapon at all! The zombie killed me, and I got reloaded with no items in a room with a enemy and my flashlight STILL shining from my hand but not actually there...

As long as this game has been out, it shouldn't still be this bug riddled to the point of feeling like an 'Early Access' Beta release of an otherwise very promising premise a good game.

developer_response.body:
Hello Teeple, 
Thank you very much for your very pertinent analysis, really contructive and detailled, it's so much important to receive feedback like yours !
Very Bad Dreams has indeed been out for over a year now on the appLab in order to continue improving it.
Unfortunately, with only 3 people working on all versions (PSVR, PSVR2/PCVR/META QUEST), it's difficult for us to update all versions at the same time.
But know that we never give up, and the frustrating behaviors you mentioned will be corrected. (If the save function doesn't work on your backpack, it's because there's been a bug, since it's supposed to save your items and weapons).
I hope you'll be motivated to finish the game, as it still offers a few surprises at the end!

I wish you an Happy New Years !

See You soon.

Marc

reviews.review_description: hey, first of all, it often throws me out of the game while loading, during the game I encountered many errors such as when I took the key, my hand got longer like Slenderman's and I couldn't open the padlock, when opening doors or drawers I often had to try many times before my hand grabbed the handle because usually I flew through them to no avail. I ended up finishing the game quickly because I love games of this type, but many times I had to reload my saves and try until I succeeded. I also wish you all the best in the new year.

developer_response.body:
Hi Jarek, 
Thanks for your review, we are open to any constructive criticism to improve the game but your comments lack details. 
Could you explain to us what exactly your problems are?
Thanking you by advanced and wishing you an happy New year 2025.
Marc

reviews.review_description:
A little Gem of a VR game.  To start of with the atmospherics are awesome - from the visuals to the sound and the every so slight whispered voices this game gets you in.  Its a very dark game so not for the fait hearted but once your in its hard to stop.  Mechanics take a bit to get use to - but that's like all games.
I would highly recommend - just don't play it before bed.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your kind words!

We’re really happy to hear that you enjoyed the atmosphere, visual design, and sound work. Creating an immersive experience that slowly draws players in was a key focus for us.

We appreciate your thoughts on the mechanics as well, and thank you for taking the time to share your experience and recommendation.

reviews.review_description:
The game seemed like everything I'd love in a VR/ Horror game minus a captivating story and character/s.
But as I was enjoying the atmosphere through the tutorial and beginning level up until you become literally bug sized in your (?) room, it's at this point that I decided a refund was now needed before wasting any more precious time trying to figure out wtf the development team had in mind for this section! 
I climbed up to the top of the desk, answered the phone, climbed up the bookshelf using all of the available glowing thumb tacks, and there is LITERALLY nothing I can do!
The last thumb tack is in the top-middle  of the bookcase with NOTHING else to grab, there's NOTHING else I can interact with in the entire fu***ng room, and thus NO reason to keep a game that was made with this complete lack of any logical direction. 
So though I had high hopes for it, I have no reason to keep a game that only gives me 15 minutes of limited gameplay...

Save your money...

developer_response.body:
Hello JCTII,

There is something to do !!! 

Grab the Zipline !  (at the End of the Pin)

I send you a screen showing where you have to grab it >> https://drive.google.com/file/d/1msROOh7G-qCJfLnMlEHkylWzqgMAxpRq/view?usp=sharing

I wish you a Merry Christmas and Happy New Year !

Best regards,
CREATIVEVR3D

reviews.review_description: This game doesn't have a Chinese version, it's really stupid

developer_response.body:
Hi dasz46, "Very Bad Dreams" include a Chinese, Korean and Japanese version. (Also English, French, Spanish, Italian and Russian version).
Please double check the option !
Thanks

reviews.review_description: Games dope but could use some work. I'm not sure why. But I've un-installed and re installed a couple times but the game can't help but to crash every 20 to 30 minutes :/ also very easy to accidentally break a level and not know what to do next. The grab mechanic is broken as well I've been trying to grab the tweezers in the hospital level for 2 days now 😑 I'd like to finish this game but I genuinely don't know if the game will allow me to do so. Which sucks because the game Is actually dope
This game is super creepy... Do not play before bed.

Was at a friend's house and she showed me this game on Steam VR which on the initial run really freaked me out. Came home and took me quite some time to recover 🤣. Since I have the quest headset instead of any other one, thought of searching the store if this game was native to quest and to my surprise it was (app lab). Anyway, purchased this game without any hesitation (I like to push my limits). What can I say except that the developer of this game really made something unique and not like the usual meta quest based horror game. (And I can name quite a few). Played many other horror games which were forgotten after completion but this one really stayed with me and I am only 20 minutes in. I have to take a break from playing after witnessing the first chase scene but hopefully will get back into the game soon. I hope that the developer will continue updating and adding to this game as well as making a sequel in the near future as I would definitely be buying it. If you are a horror fan than this is a no-brainer and you should definitely buy and recommend to anyone who listens to also buy. Also would like to mention that the glitches of the game actually add to the horror experience rather than hinder it. 

EDIT

For some reason the game is no longer working on the quest headset. I've tried on my quest 2 as well as quest 3 headset.

EDIT 2

The developers were super responsive and within an hour of me emailing them they had fixed the game and had it working again. Only downside for me was that I lost my saved game and had to start from the beginning.

My review so far is based on some serious issues in this game. Don’t get me wrong, but this game truly is amazing. However; I get to the point of chapter 1.3 in that morgue. Game glitches so bad, I’m walking through walls. 
   What I did get to play before this point was bloody impressive. However after you put those pictures up on the wall, everything just goes weird. Including my hands were upside down, just sort of happened when I grabbed something. I know this game is on Steam. Hopefully it can be fixed promptly.

developer_response.body:
Hi Arhmovie, Many thanks for your feedback, could you contact me directly by email at contact@crvr3d.com to explain in detail the problems you encountered? we will do a corrective update very soon.
Marc

reviews.review_description:
The horror aspect of the game is convincing, the work on light and ambiance is really promising.
Knowing the performances possible on the quest, it’s hard to put such work on a game.
I hope seeing more of it in the future.

reviews.review_title: 😱😱😱😱 THIS IS WHAT VR IS FOR!!!!
reviews.review_description:
Adrenaline rush!! Is all I have to say!!! 

Hopefully in the future this can become Co-Op 
Fingers crossed 🤞

developer_response.body:
Hi JustB, sorry for my late reply and thousands thanks for your feedback, it goes straight to our hearts !
We also hope to release a co-op mode this year with some surprises never seen before but shhhhh, no spoilers!

reviews.review_description:
Update:

The developer after seeing this review kindly offered me a key so I could keep testing it.

The developers are extremely responsive to feedback in their discord server and are releasing updates at a rapid pace.

Unfortunately I still can’t recommend it in its current state.  Some issues have improved, like the performance, but many remain. On my last attempt it took me three tries to get past one area due to technical issues. I did end up getting a lot further in the game, but I had another item vanish when I tried adding it to my inventory. If it’s an essential item, I may have to start over.

I raised my review from one star. Five stars for the responsiveness and artistic creativity of the developers, two stars for the technical quality of the game, three stars overall.

If they can polish this game it could be a real treat for horror fans.

Original Review:

I’ve been interested in this game for awhile so when it came out just before Halloween I couldn’t resist.

It has potential, but just in the first few minutes of play I ran into so many issues. Janky VR mechanics, a crash to the Meta home, really freaky full body model, a vital inventory item vanishing, and finally my right hand flipped backwards on my arm rendering it unusable.  The performance is also very poor. I played it on the Quest 3 and there were frequent pauses and objects popping in. It would likely run even worse on the Quest 2.

The hand glitch may be due to the game not handing natural turning well.

It could be a good game someday, but in its current state it’s virtually unplayable.

I’m requesting a refund, but I’ll keep an eye on the game to see if it gets fixed up.

reviews.review_title: If I could just start the game...
reviews.review_description: I’m sorry to give this assessment, but I can’t even get into the game. I am stuck in the "room" of the lighter and I don’t understand how to go on. Ready to change the rating as soon as I can get into the game

developer_response.body:
Hi Dancia, don't worry we are here to help you !
I'm not sure where you are so i need to ask you few questions, did you finish the tutorial ?
If yes you are certainly in a Hotel room, it's that ? In this case you just have to find the TV remote to continue the adventure.
If you are not in the hotel room, you are certainly in the very first level with the lighter on a table with two poster explaining how to grab, it's that ?
If it's the case you just have to grab and light the lighter and then you will be able to walk in the corridor to reach the tutorial part.
Don't hesitate to come back to me if you need more explanation.
Thanks
Marc

reviews.review_description: A game that touches all our darkest nightmares.  Well made and recommended for horror lovers
Just got it the graphics are triple AAA  fantastic

I gave the first level of the game a try tonight and as a non-gamer let me say I do appreciate the training and in-game hints that help me get started. Due to physical limitations I don't get into VR as much that I would like and so I don't really have the intuitive grasp of how things work. But I got through the first bunch of challenges I think successfully. I say I think because I have no idea yet if putting on the mask was a good plan. I have to laugh because the exact same thing that I yell at characters in horror movies not to do I went ahead and did. In a setting that was creepy enough that I should know better. So far so good with the game but I have to take off a star because I struggled a bit with figuring out how to reload the pistol. I haven't figured it out yet but hopefully I will the next session. One other note is that I'm not entirely sure if pumping my arms to run makes any difference. It doesn't seem to.

reviews.review_title: Very disturbing! The devs are crazy!
reviews.review_description: Ummmmmm……wow! This experience is so creepy, dark, twisted, weird, mysterious, and disturbing. I love it! Haha. I’m not spooked easily but I’m still enjoying it. Can’t wait to get back in it to see if I can be spooked or have a jump scare . I want more!

reviews.review_title: Buy if you want to be scared..
reviews.review_description: Well what can I say! I have read some early reviews where the game had glitches however as I understand it the Devs have just updated the game improving graphics, performance and debugging. The game is dark, scary and atmospheric, if you like horror you will love this.  An immersive game, the visuals are extremely good, the sound is spooky and draws you in, had me looking behind me, above me, everywhere, creepy as you like, especially playing at night.  Controls seem ok and the game play is intuitive.  I have only played the first chapter so far and this game has plenty of potential and I am looking forward to progressing with it….Buy it now if you want to be scared…..

reviews.review_title: Great potential and scary as hell
reviews.review_description:
I played this game about 20 minutes and I have to say that it shows great potential.
The interactions with the objects are clean and smooth,  the graphic is great and the story seems absolutely engaging.
Scary!!

Ok, so after nearly quitting and refunding this game for the obscene bugs in the very opening, the tutorial if you will, I made myself stick it through only for a bit. 

The positive reviews here mentioned how inventive, original and captivating the art is and I wanted to see that. 

So I had to restart the game to make smooth turning functional, but every so often it would go back to snap for no reason for a short while and return to smooth.  Ok.

The bow which is crucial to the end of the tutorial disappeared? Ok.

I’ve enabled sitting mode but it seems like I’m super short anyway. Ok.

I’m thinking, man am I going to refund this.
But then I get ahead, and the visuals, the artwork, the design is so wild and creepy that I’ve decided I’ll keep it, wait for it to get polished and fixed up and play whatever apps I can at the moment. It’s promising, and I only went 15 min tops.

I’ll raise the ratings as it improves, and I’m hopeful it will. 

Also this is a French team! French people know how to do horror!

It reminds me specifically of a French mini series called Marianne. It has that creep factor. 

Oh yeah, use my referral code if you are going for it 

L I N K T R , 
                    E E
                          /
                            D I S C O U N T
                                                  F U R Y

A great horror game. If you like horror games it is a good option.
The setting is seen to have been taken care of to the maximum. The spectacular soundtrack.
Hoping they release additional content.

Well, i just made the purchase of this game, and what an absolutely amazing piece of art! I played just 15 minutes, and I'm loving it so far. I have changed my pants a few times now, lol. It's definitely worth a purchase if you are a horror fan.  

Keep up the great work.
Great game!! Highly recommend!

developer_response.body: Thousands thanks Vexotos !

reviews.review_title: Doesn't work.. so far not good
reviews.review_description: I'm using it in stationary but I start the game and it just takes me to a black screen.. waited ages..  painful waste of money.. can you help me fix this bug? Pls 🙏 I'll edit review after

reviews.review_title: An horror game like you never see before
reviews.review_description:
I did not finished the game yet.
It take a lot of cloud space around 10gb but so far they worth it.

This game is very scary and mind twisted.

It's not easy but well made, graphics are very realistic, I had couple of jump scare so far.

Congrats to the developers that done a good job with this new game that deserves to be approved by Meta to be a real game not app lab anymore.

I normally don't like scary games but this game was very well made. Graphics are well done with just enough hints to help you find your way through. Definitely felt like a bad dream and I got goosebumps playing!

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your feedback!

We’re really glad to hear that you enjoyed the experience, especially if this isn’t usually your preferred genre. Finding the right balance between atmosphere, guidance, and immersion was an important goal for us.

Thanks for playing and for sharing your thoughts!

reviews.review_description:
Just played a small bit so far, knees trembling hoping I won’t completely scream the house down.
Thanks to the Devs looking forward to getting more scares soon.

Welcome to the depths of hell, this is not for the faint of heart.  Hands down it’s one of the best horror games I’ve ever played. It’s not extremely long but for the price it’s definitely worth it.  I played it on the quest 2 and the graphics were some of the best I’ve ever seen, I can only imagine how much better they would be on the quest 3. If you’re even thinking about getting this game I would highly recommend it.  I look forward to seeing more like this from these developers, excellent work!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi MightyElric, I can't tell you how much your comment pleases us, know that we continue to improve the game significantly, a new update will arrive soon including new features from the "Very Bad Dreams" version on PSVR2.
DLC will also be arriving later this year, thank you again for your support.

reviews.review_description: I have enjoyed playing this so far, the sound effects are particularly good as are the graphics. I would definitely recommend this game.
